testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
23:18:27.518 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [tn.esprit.microservice.reclamation.MsReclamationApplicationTests]: MsReclamationApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 23:18:28.071 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration tn.esprit.microservice.reclamation.MsReclamationApplication for test class tn.esprit.microservice.reclamation.MsReclamationApplicationTests

Hibernate: drop table if exists reclamation_responses Hibernate: drop table if exists reclamations Hibernate: drop table if exists sla_alerts Hibernate: create table reclamation_responses ( is_internal bit not null, created_date datetime(6) not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, reclamation_id bigint not null, quoted_text varchar(1000), learner_id varchar(255), quoted_author varchar(255), reaction varchar(255), response_text TEXT not null, sender_id varchar(255) not null, sender_type varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table reclamations ( access_date date, amount float(53), completion_date date, desired_resolution_date date, gravity_score integer, is_suspect bit, payment_date date, priority integer, satisfaction_score integer, admin_id bigint, course_id bigint, created_date datetime(6) not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, lesson_id bigint, moderated_by bigint, moderated_date datetime(6), resolved_date datetime(6), satisfaction_date datetime(6), updated_date datetime(6), contact_phone varchar(20), content_type varchar(50), device_type varchar(50), error_code varchar(50), external_tool varchar(50), invoice_number varchar(50), payment_method varchar(50), browser_name varchar(100), certificate_type varchar(100), external_ticket_id varchar(100), os_version varchar(100), transaction_id varchar(100), subject varchar(200) not null, attachment_url varchar(500), external_ticket_url varchar(500), page_url varchar(500), additional_info TEXT, description TEXT not null, error_message TEXT, gravity_level varchar(255), learner_id varchar(255) not null, moderation_reason TEXT, satisfaction_comment TEXT, status enum ('CLOSED','IN_PROGRESS','PENDING','REJECTED','RESOLVED') not null, type enum ('ACCESS','CERTIFICATE','CONTENT','OTHER','PAYMENT','TECHNICAL') not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table sla_alerts ( email_sent bit, priority integer, resolved bit, sla_minutes integer, alert_date datetime(6) not null, elapsed_minutes bigint, id bigint not null auto_increment, reclamation_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: alter table
